task_completion.description: Search or filter the complaints list for 'Project Omega'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search bar, filter, or list view showing complaints with 'Project Omega' in the title.

task_completion.description: Identify and access the first High priority Project Omega complaint (Server Breach).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The complaint details or list row for 'Server Breach' is visible, showing a 'High' priority indicator.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'expedite-review' tag to the first High priority complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'expedite-review' is visibly applied to the 'Server Breach' complaint in the UI.

task_completion.description: Identify and access the second High priority Project Omega complaint (Data Corruption).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The complaint details or list row for 'Data Corruption' is visible, showing a 'High' priority indicator.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'expedite-review' tag to the second High priority complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'expedite-review' is visibly applied to the 'Data Corruption' complaint in the UI.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Low priority complaint is not tagged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Routine Maintenance' complaint (Low priority) is visible in the list or details view and does NOT have the 'expedite-review' tag.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to search and apply tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web application's UI (e.g., clicking buttons, typing in search boxes, using tag input fields) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands, curl, or database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools are open showing direct API calls or SQL updates to the cases.

integrity.description: The tags were applied within the actual case management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'expedite-review' tags appear as native UI elements (like chips or badges) within the application, not just text written in a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 3 'Project Omega' complaints in the system. 2 of them are High priority ('Server Breach' and 'Data Corruption') and must be tagged with 'expedite-review'. 1 of them is Low priority ('Routine Maintenance') and must NOT be tagged with 'expedite-review'.
